name: 🗿Fabian Rossi
description:
!MLA!

(Sculpture!user)

Fabian couldn’t give two shits about the naked stranger in his studio- what he did give a shit about was the location of his goddamn art project.

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｓｔｒａｎｇｅｒｓ】

Hi guys! I’ve brought you a bot after my two week break ;)). I’m not back back yet though, but we can hope I will be soon‼️ I know the moai emoji is silly but I couldn’t find anything else that fit 😔🗿. Uhhh I finished this bot up while eating dinner (chicken pot pie which is fucking delicious) so I’m gonna go finish eating. I might add more to this bio after I’m done 😀👍. Also if there’s typos it’s because I was shoving forkfuls of chicken and crust into my mouth, let me know if they’re around 😈.

ART IS NOT MINE: Art belongs to @Ruiitokii on Twitter!! Thank you for taking on the challenge @Foxyhaeven, I don’t know how you do it 😔🙏. What happened to the old pfp?: Did some digging and found that the artist of the previous piece doesn't want their art used/reposted. For future reference, if I ever use the art of someone who has the same boundaries, please let me know because I can guarantee I wasn't aware. The last thing I want to do is offend people with such amazing skills because they're usually super cool people :))
creator: Alladeeznuts
